summary.en: Mobile app and coaching program that helps employees sleep better.
summary.zh: 幫助員工改善睡眠的行動應用程式與教練計畫。

highlight.en: Combines one-on-one sleep coaching, short lessons, and relaxing audio sessions so employees and their families fall asleep faster and sleep through the night.
highlight.zh: 結合一對一睡眠教練、短篇課程與放鬆音訊內容,幫助員工及其家人更快入睡並一夜好眠。

summary.en: PowerRouter helps sales teams route leads to the right reps inside Salesforce.
summary.zh: PowerRouter 協助銷售團隊在 Salesforce 中將潛在客戶分配給合適的業務。

highlight.en: A drag-and-drop automation engine lets teams build lead routing rules visually and track speed-to-lead metrics directly within their Salesforce CRM.
highlight.zh: 拖放式自動化引擎讓團隊以視覺化方式建立潛在客戶分派規則,並直接在 Salesforce CRM 中追蹤回應速度指標。

summary.en: Video publishing and monetization platform for creators and artists.
summary.zh: 為創作者與藝術家打造的影片發布與變現平台。

highlight.en: Positioned as Substack for video creators, offering flexible monetization like PPV, micro-subscriptions, and merch drops, with 4K streaming on Apple TV, Roku, and game consoles.
highlight.zh: 定位為影片創作者版的 Substack,提供 PPV、微訂閱與周邊販售等彈性變現方式,並支援 Apple TV、Roku 與遊戲主機的 4K 串流。

summary.en: Clinical skincare tested on diverse skin, now available in Sephora.
summary.zh: 在多元膚質上測試的臨床護膚品牌,現已於 Sephora 上架。

highlight.en: A clinical skincare line developed and tested across diverse skin types, with retail distribution through Sephora.
highlight.zh: 一個針對多元膚質開發並測試的臨床護膚產品線,透過 Sephora 通路零售販售。

summary.en: Fine-grained access control for web3 applications.
summary.zh: 為 web3 應用程式提供細緻的存取權限控制。

highlight.en: A developer platform that brings login, role-based access control, and data storage to any web3-enabled application.
highlight.zh: 一個開發者平台,為任何支援 web3 的應用程式提供登入、角色型存取控制與資料儲存功能。

summary.en: Analytics built for the trades.
summary.zh: 專為技術工種行業打造的數據分析工具。

highlight.en: Gives home service contractors real-time data to optimize and scale their business operations.
highlight.zh: 為家庭服務承包商提供即時數據,協助他們優化並擴展業務營運。

summary.en: A database built for app developers.
summary.zh: 專為應用程式開發者打造的資料庫。

highlight.en: A full-stack solution for data persistence, state management, and realtime synchronization aimed at fast-moving web applications.
highlight.zh: 一套全端解決方案,為求快速迭代的 Web 應用程式提供資料持久化、狀態管理與即時同步。

summary.en: Communication and publishing tools for scientists.
summary.zh: 為科學家打造的溝通與出版工具。

highlight.en: Aims to make every scientific report feature interactive graphs with live data, making research easier to share and reproduce.
highlight.zh: 致力於讓每份科學報告都能呈現帶有即時資料的互動圖表,使研究更易於分享與重現。

summary.en: Chrome extension that turns clicks and keystrokes into no-code automations.
summary.zh: 將點擊與按鍵轉化為無程式碼自動化的 Chrome 擴充功能。

highlight.en: Records your clicks and keystrokes and replays them on similar web pages, working like Excel macros for any website.
highlight.zh: 錄製你的點擊與按鍵動作,並在類似網頁上重播,如同適用於任何網站的 Excel 巨集。

summary.en: Open source mobile marketing automation platform, an alternative to Appcues and Braze.
summary.zh: 開源行動行銷自動化平台,可替代 Appcues 與 Braze。

highlight.en: Lets teams segment users and run scheduled push, SMS, and email campaigns, positioned against tools like Braze, Customer.io, Iterable, and Pendo.
highlight.zh: 讓團隊得以分眾用戶並執行排程推播、簡訊與電子郵件活動,定位對標 Braze、Customer.io、Iterable 與 Pendo。

summary.en: Live, virtual running classes for runners around the world.
summary.zh: 為全球跑者提供的即時虛擬跑步課程。

highlight.en: Hosts 20+ daily live classes where a certified coach tracks each runner's pace and cadence in real time, letting participants worldwide run and chat together.
highlight.zh: 每日舉辦 20 場以上的即時課程,由認證教練即時追蹤每位跑者的配速與步頻,讓全球參與者一起跑步並互相交流。

summary.en: Hire fractional marketing and design talent on a contract-to-hire basis.
summary.zh: 以先合作後聘用的方式招募兼職行銷與設計人才。

highlight.en: Provides a shortlist of vetted candidates averaging 5-7+ years of experience in design, growth, ops, product, and engineering, mostly US-based.
highlight.zh: 提供一份經篩選的候選人名單,平均擁有 5 至 7 年以上設計、成長、營運、產品與工程經驗,且多數位於美國。

summary.en: Building robots to automate commercial concrete construction.
summary.zh: 打造機器人以自動化商業混凝土施工。

highlight.en: Its automated robots for concrete floor construction let one person do the work of six construction workers.
highlight.zh: 其混凝土地坪施工自動化機器人,讓一個人就能完成六名工人的工作量。

summary.en: Accelerating the shift to a more transparent economy.
summary.zh: 加速邁向更透明的經濟。

highlight.en: Helps users align spending with their values by surfacing ESG data on the companies they shop at, with perks and rewards to keep it engaging.
highlight.zh: 透過呈現用戶消費商家的 ESG 資料,並輔以優惠與獎勵,協助用戶讓金錢與自身價值觀一致。

summary.en: An operating system for the maritime industry.
summary.zh: 為航運業打造的作業系統。

highlight.en: Offers ship operators a suite of tools for fleet monitoring, route intelligence, crew risk analysis, and port-agent communications.
highlight.zh: 為船舶營運商提供一套工具,涵蓋船隊監控、航線情報、船員風險分析與港口代理通訊。

summary.en: Nimbus reduces Datadog costs by more than 60% with no manual effort.
summary.zh: Nimbus 在無需人工介入下,將 Datadog 成本降低逾 60%。

highlight.en: An optimization engine that aims to deliver FANG-like observability to any organization by cutting Datadog costs by an order of magnitude without developer effort.
highlight.zh: 一套最佳化引擎,目標是在不需開發者介入下將 Datadog 成本降低一個數量級,讓任何組織都享有 FANG 等級的可觀測性。

summary.en: Mobile-first business intelligence for small businesses in India.
summary.zh: 為印度小型企業打造的行動優先商業智慧工具。

highlight.en: Frees SMEs from hard-to-access accounting software with an app that tracks debtors, creditors, sales, and outstanding balances for faster decisions.
highlight.zh: 以一款應用程式讓中小企業擺脫難以存取的會計軟體,追蹤應收、應付、銷售與未結餘額,加速決策。

summary.en: The distributed data operating system.
summary.zh: 分散式資料作業系統。

highlight.en: Lets business operators connect and automate processes on top of any data, while engineers connect data across any stack and format quickly.
highlight.zh: 讓業務人員在任何資料之上連接並自動化流程,同時讓工程師快速跨任何技術堆疊與格式串接資料。

summary.en: A governance client for Nouns DAO.
summary.zh: Nouns DAO 的治理客戶端。

highlight.en: A dedicated client for participating in Nouns DAO governance.
highlight.zh: 一個專為參與 Nouns DAO 治理而設計的客戶端。

summary.en: Creating a new class of drugs to address incurable autoimmune diseases.
summary.zh: 開發新型藥物以對抗無法治癒的自體免疫疾病。

highlight.en: Uses novel engineered exosome technology to create modern treatments for immune-mediated diseases such as psoriasis.
highlight.zh: 運用新型工程化外泌體技術,為乾癬等免疫介導疾病開發現代療法。

summary.en: AI-powered code review.
summary.zh: 由 AI 驅動的程式碼審查。

highlight.en: Its AI is trained on millions of code contributions to flag risky changes in pull requests, helping teams ship faster with more confidence.
highlight.zh: 其 AI 以數百萬筆程式碼貢獻訓練而成,可標記 pull request 中的高風險變更,協助團隊更快且更有信心地交付。

summary.en: Code review for DevOps tasks.
summary.zh: 針對 DevOps 任務的程式碼審查。

highlight.en: Lets any engineer perform DevOps work under the DevOps team's supervision, so developers no longer block on DevOps tasks.
highlight.zh: 讓任何工程師都能在 DevOps 團隊監督下執行 DevOps 工作,使開發者不再因 DevOps 任務而卡關。

summary.en: Tools to run engaging online conferences.
summary.zh: 用於舉辦引人入勝的線上會議的工具。

highlight.en: Unlike Hopin or Zoom, it focuses on networking, letting attendees self-organize, meet, and stay in touch rather than just watch talks.
highlight.zh: 與 Hopin 或 Zoom 不同,它專注於人脈交流,讓與會者自行組織、結識並保持聯繫,而非僅僅觀看演講。

summary.en: AI that keeps complex construction projects on schedule.
summary.zh: 讓複雜營建專案準時推進的 AI。

highlight.en: Automates dependency tracking and schedule coordination across dozens of interdependent workstreams, freeing project managers to focus on higher-order judgment.
highlight.zh: 自動處理數十個相互依賴工作流之間的相依性追蹤與排程協調,讓專案經理得以專注於更高層次的判斷。

summary.en: The first online marketplace for home garden and lawn supplies.
summary.zh: 首個家庭園藝與草坪用品的線上市集。

highlight.en: Connects gardening buyers with the 24,000 shops across the US, bringing a $26B offline category online.
highlight.zh: 將園藝買家與全美 24,000 家商店串連起來,把規模達 260 億美元的線下品類帶到線上。

summary.en: Bioengineered kidneys for patients with kidney failure.
summary.zh: 為腎衰竭患者打造的生物工程腎臟。

highlight.en: Develops an implantable therapeutic tissue that supplements renal function, aiming to free end-stage renal disease patients from dialysis dependency.
highlight.zh: 開發可植入的治療性組織以補充腎功能,目標是讓末期腎病患者擺脫對洗腎的依賴。

summary.en: Subscriptions for neighborhood businesses.
summary.zh: 為社區商家提供的訂閱服務。

highlight.en: Brings recurring subscription models to local neighborhood businesses.
highlight.zh: 為在地社區商家引入經常性訂閱模式。

summary.en: A marketplace for small business mergers and acquisitions.
summary.zh: 小型企業併購市集。

highlight.en: Billed as the first small business M&A marketplace, with modern integrations to make buying and selling a business quick and easy.
highlight.zh: 號稱首個小型企業併購市集,透過現代化整合讓買賣企業變得快速簡便。

summary.en: Building the operating system for medical diagnosis.
summary.zh: 打造醫療診斷的作業系統。

highlight.en: Tackles the 4 billion annual radiology scans where 1 in 5 reports are wrong and 35% are delayed, building a platform for access and efficiency.
highlight.zh: 針對每年 40 億次放射檢查中五分之一報告有誤、35% 延遲的問題,打造提升存取與效率的平台。

summary.en: International contractor and multi-country payroll.
summary.zh: 跨國承包商與多國薪資發放服務。

highlight.en: Lets companies set up legal entities around the world and compliantly hire and pay their international teams.
highlight.zh: 讓企業在全球設立法律實體,並合規地聘用與支付其國際團隊薪資。

summary.en: Turbocharge customer acquisition through exclusive SaaS partnerships.
summary.zh: 透過獨家 SaaS 合作關係加速客戶獲取。

highlight.en: Lets SaaS companies leverage partnerships with other SaaS firms to accelerate their customer acquisition.
highlight.zh: 讓 SaaS 公司藉由與其他 SaaS 業者的合作關係加速客戶獲取。

summary.en: AI that tracks and analyzes public policy.
summary.zh: 追蹤並分析公共政策的 AI。

highlight.en: Collects and analyzes legislation, speeches, executive orders, and more from government bodies in 64 countries, helping Fortune 500 firms uncover policy insights.
highlight.zh: 收集並分析 64 個國家政府機構的立法、演講、行政命令等內容,協助財星 500 大企業發掘政策洞察。

summary.en: Visual, collaborative financial modeling software.
summary.zh: 視覺化、可協作的財務建模軟體。

highlight.en: Gives finance teams a drag-and-drop interface to build, share, and update financial models in real time, with connections for comparing plan versus actuals.
highlight.zh: 為財務團隊提供拖放式介面,即時建立、分享與更新財務模型,並可串接工具比對預算與實際數字。

summary.en: High-accuracy global weather data from low-cost flat satellites.
summary.zh: 以低成本平板衛星提供高準確度的全球氣象資料。

highlight.en: Its flat-panel radar satellite is claimed to be 1000x more cost-effective and is the smallest radar satellite ever, with $35M in LOIs including from the Air Force.
highlight.zh: 其平板雷達衛星宣稱成本效益高出 1000 倍,且為史上最小的雷達衛星,已累積 3,500 萬美元意向書,其中包含來自美國空軍的訂單。

summary.en: A neurostimulation implant to restore hearing and speech understanding.
summary.zh: 用於恢復聽力與言語理解能力的神經刺激植入裝置。

highlight.en: Spun out of Stanford Biodesign, it targets 3.5M US patients who no longer benefit from hearing aids but aren't ready for a cochlear implant, via a reversible, less invasive surgery.
highlight.zh: 由史丹佛 Biodesign 衍生創立,以可逆且侵入性較低的手術,鎖定美國 350 萬名助聽器已無效、卻又尚未準備接受人工電子耳的患者。

summary.en: A realistic virtual video studio to record and stream from your browser.
summary.zh: 在瀏覽器中錄製與直播的擬真虛擬攝影棚。

highlight.en: Lets hosts record and stream a show in a realistic virtual studio even with remote guests, needing only a camera and a browser.
highlight.zh: 讓主持人即使來賓遠端參與,也能在擬真虛擬攝影棚中錄製與直播節目,只需一台攝影機與瀏覽器。

summary.en: A network where sales teams connect to share customer introductions.
summary.zh: 讓銷售團隊彼此交流並分享客戶引薦的人脈網路。

highlight.en: A free B2B network where sales teams exchange customer introductions, with onboarding in under five minutes.
highlight.zh: 一個免費的 B2B 人脈網路,讓銷售團隊交換客戶引薦,五分鐘內即可上手。

summary.en: Create video testimonials with a link.
summary.zh: 用一個連結就能製作影片見證。

highlight.en: A video marketing platform that lets marketers collect, clip, and ship short-form content like customer and employee testimonials in minutes.
highlight.zh: 一個影片行銷平台,讓行銷人員在數分鐘內收集、剪輯並發布客戶與員工見證等短影音內容。

summary.en: An online marketplace for dinners shipped from great restaurants.
summary.zh: 提供優質餐廳晚餐宅配的線上市集。

highlight.en: Lets people order ready-to-eat multi-course dinners from great restaurants shipped nationwide, as an alternative to cooking or take-out.
highlight.zh: 讓人們向優質餐廳訂購即食多道式晚餐並全國宅配,作為自己下廚或外帶的替代選擇。

summary.en: Add powerful decision-making capabilities to any automated workflow.
summary.zh: 為任何自動化工作流加入強大的決策能力。

highlight.en: Separates decision logic from workflows with a spreadsheet-like interface, exposing rules as API endpoints, visual forms, and connections to tools like Zapier.
highlight.zh: 以類試算表的介面將決策邏輯與工作流分離,並將規則開放為 API 端點、視覺化表單及與 Zapier 等工具的串接。

summary.en: The command center for product teams.
summary.zh: 產品團隊的指揮中心。

highlight.en: Aims to be for PMs what Figma is for designers and Linear for engineers, keeping everything from specs to decisions fresh in one place.
highlight.zh: 目標是成為產品經理版的 Figma 或 Linear,將從規格到決策的所有資訊集中於一處並保持最新。

summary.en: A longevity nutrition meal service.
summary.zh: 主打長壽的營養餐服務。

highlight.en: Prepares Blueprint Protocol-inspired meals for longevity and performance, made organic, local, gluten-free, and seed oil free.
highlight.zh: 製作以 Blueprint 計畫為靈感、訴求長壽與表現的餐點,採用有機、在地、無麩質且不含種子油的食材。

summary.en: Software for remote monitoring of cancer patients.
summary.zh: 用於遠端監測癌症患者的軟體。

highlight.en: Helps hospitals provide automated round-the-clock support to discharged cancer patients, addressing India's shortage of just 2,200 oncologists for 1.38 billion people.
highlight.zh: 協助醫院為出院癌症患者提供全天候自動化支援,因應印度僅有 2,200 名腫瘤科醫師服務 13.8 億人口的困境。

summary.en: An operating system for server-side apps.
summary.zh: 為伺服器端應用程式打造的作業系統。

highlight.en: A runtime for low-latency, distributed networking apps that borrows ideas from Go and Erlang while using WebAssembly to reuse existing code and libraries.
highlight.zh: 一個用於低延遲分散式網路應用的執行環境,汲取 Go 與 Erlang 的理念,並運用 WebAssembly 以重用既有程式碼與函式庫。

summary.en: Galaxy is a B2B software startup from YC Winter 2021.
summary.zh: Galaxy 是來自 YC 2021 冬季梯次的 B2B 軟體新創。

highlight.en: A B2B venture from the YC Winter 2021 batch, operating under the LaunchPoint HQ brand.
highlight.zh: 出自 YC 2021 冬季梯次的 B2B 新創,以 LaunchPoint HQ 品牌營運。

summary.en: Collaborative ticketing that integrates into Teams and Slack.
summary.zh: 整合至 Teams 與 Slack 的協作式工單系統。

highlight.en: Lets IT and Ops teams build no-code workflows for internal tickets, requests, and approvals, replacing bloated email chains and group inboxes.
highlight.zh: 讓 IT 與營運團隊建立無程式碼工作流,處理內部工單、請求與審批,取代冗長的郵件往返與群組信箱。

summary.en: Improving developer experience with streamlined code reviews in Slack.
summary.zh: 透過 Slack 中簡化的程式碼審查提升開發者體驗。

highlight.en: Integrates with Slack to deliver real-time code review notifications and natural discussions, reducing review hassle for engineering teams.
highlight.zh: 與 Slack 整合,提供即時程式碼審查通知與自然的討論串,減輕工程團隊的審查負擔。

summary.en: A configuration language for building enterprise web apps 10x faster.
summary.zh: 用於以 10 倍速度建構企業 Web 應用的設定式語言。

highlight.en: Lets developers build full web apps from a simple config while still using React and Node.js, removing the need to wire a dozen technologies together.
highlight.zh: 讓開發者以簡單的設定檔建構完整 Web 應用,同時仍可使用 React 與 Node.js,免去串接十多種技術的麻煩。

summary.en: Developing cell-specific genetic medicines.
summary.zh: 開發針對特定細胞的基因藥物。

highlight.en: A therapeutics company focused on genetic medicines that target specific cell types.
highlight.zh: 一家專注於可鎖定特定細胞類型的基因藥物的療法公司。

summary.en: The unbiased AI and data layer for skin health.
summary.zh: 為肌膚健康打造的中立 AI 與資料層。

highlight.en: A free app where users track routines and selfies and get brand-agnostic advice, building a longitudinal dataset for consumers, clinicians, and brands in a $200B+ industry.
highlight.zh: 一款免費應用,讓用戶追蹤保養流程與自拍照並取得不偏向品牌的建議,為這個逾 2,000 億美元產業的消費者、臨床醫師與品牌建立縱貫性資料集。

summary.en: Building new anti-aging ingredients for skincare.
summary.zh: 為護膚品開發新型抗老化成分。

highlight.en: Has developed a patented, photostable ingredient that triples current UVA protection, targeting the UVA light that drives most sun-related skin aging.
highlight.zh: 已開發出一種專利、光穩定的成分,可將現有 UVA 防護力提升三倍,鎖定造成多數陽光性肌膚老化的 UVA 光。

summary.en: Catch accidental database exposures before attackers do.
summary.zh: 搶在攻擊者之前發現意外暴露的資料庫。

highlight.en: A security tool focused on detecting accidentally exposed databases before they can be exploited by bad actors.
highlight.zh: 一款安全工具,專注於在惡意人士利用之前偵測意外暴露的資料庫。

summary.en: AI workers for logistics operations.
summary.zh: 用於物流營運的 AI 工作者。

highlight.en: Its AI agents use cameras, voice, email, and document processing to automate high-accountability freight tasks like ID verification, POD reconciliation, and invoice audits.
highlight.zh: 其 AI 代理運用攝影機、語音、電子郵件與文件處理,自動化身分驗證、簽收對帳與發票稽核等高責任貨運任務。

summary.en: Earn from the clothes in your closet without selling them.
summary.zh: 不必賣掉衣櫥裡的衣服也能從中賺錢。

highlight.en: A peer-to-peer clothing rental marketplace, an Airbnb for clothes, that unlike Rent the Runway holds no inventory and starts with sorority students.
highlight.zh: 一個點對點服裝租賃市集,如同衣服版的 Airbnb,與 Rent the Runway 不同,它不持有庫存,並以姊妹會學生為起點。

summary.en: DIY home renovations in a box with materials, tools, and instructions delivered.
summary.zh: 盒裝 DIY 居家裝修,材料、工具與說明一併寄送。

highlight.en: Formats architect-designed templates to a customer's space, buys all needed materials, and ships them with an app that guides the project from start to finish.
highlight.zh: 將建築師設計的範本套用至客戶的空間,代購所有所需材料並寄送,並附上一款從頭到尾引導施工的應用程式。

summary.en: Kid-friendly, at-home volunteer projects in a box, delivered bimonthly.
summary.zh: 適合兒童的居家志工專案盒,每兩個月配送一次。

highlight.en: Each themed box guides kids through a mini-book, empathy activities, nonprofit-designed volunteer projects, and a $5 donation they direct themselves.
highlight.zh: 每個主題盒引導孩子閱讀迷你書、進行同理心活動、參與非營利組織設計的志工專案,並親自決定一筆 5 美元捐款的去向。

summary.en: The email API built for product teams.
summary.zh: 為產品團隊打造的電子郵件 API。

highlight.en: Pairs a modern email API with a visual template builder so teams can ship faster, positioned as an alternative to SendGrid, Mailgun, and Postmark.
highlight.zh: 將現代化電子郵件 API 與視覺化範本編輯器結合,讓團隊更快交付,定位為 SendGrid、Mailgun 與 Postmark 的替代方案。

summary.en: Alibaba for Latin America.
summary.zh: 拉丁美洲版的阿里巴巴。

highlight.en: A marketplace for US companies to source products directly from Latin American manufacturers.
highlight.zh: 一個讓美國企業直接向拉丁美洲製造商採購產品的市集。

summary.en: A rewards card for gamers.
summary.zh: 為玩家打造的回饋卡。

highlight.en: A fintech rewards card designed specifically for gamers.
highlight.zh: 一張專為玩家設計的金融科技回饋卡。

summary.en: Get up and running with large language models.
summary.zh: 讓你快速上手大型語言模型。

highlight.en: A tool that makes it easy to download, run, and work with large language models locally.
highlight.zh: 一款讓你輕鬆在本地下載、執行與操作大型語言模型的工具。

summary.en: Amazon-level logistics for eCommerce companies in MENA.
summary.zh: 為中東與北非電商企業提供 Amazon 等級的物流。

highlight.en: Handles every aspect of delivery and fulfillment via its AutoPilot AI/ML system, cutting failed deliveries and operating costs in one of the fastest-growing eCommerce markets.
highlight.zh: 透過 AutoPilot AI/ML 系統處理配送與履約的各個環節,在全球成長最快的電商市場之一降低配送失敗率與營運成本。

summary.en: The everything app for Latin America.
summary.zh: 拉丁美洲的萬能應用程式。

highlight.en: Venezuela's largest ridesharing and delivery platform, processing over 16 million yearly orders plus merchant services like e-commerce stores and WhatsApp sales automation.
highlight.zh: 委內瑞拉最大的共乘與外送平台,每年處理逾 1,600 萬筆訂單,並提供電商商店與 WhatsApp 銷售自動化等商家服務。

summary.en: Building India's fast food empire.
summary.zh: 打造印度的速食帝國。

highlight.en: Operates three profitable QSR and cloud kitchen brands across 20 Mumbai locations, serving 40K orders a month with sub-one-year store payback periods.
highlight.zh: 在孟買 20 個據點經營三個獲利的速食與雲端廚房品牌,每月處理 4 萬筆訂單,單店回本期不到一年。

summary.en: A global platform for employee engagement with rewards and flexible benefits.
summary.zh: 結合獎勵與彈性福利的全球員工敬業平台。

highlight.en: A platform for rewards, flexible benefits, perks, and communities, live with 1,000+ companies across 100+ countries with around $8M ARR.
highlight.zh: 一個提供獎勵、彈性福利、優惠與社群的平台,已在 100 多國的 1,000 多家企業上線,年經常性營收約 800 萬美元。

summary.en: IP operating software for brands and content companies.
summary.zh: 為品牌與內容公司打造的智慧財產權營運軟體。

highlight.en: Founded by Harvard Law graduates, it helps brands detect and remove counterfeits and piracy across 1,500+ platforms in over 118 countries using generative AI.
highlight.zh: 由哈佛法學院畢業生創立,運用生成式 AI 協助品牌在 118 個國家、超過 1,500 個平台上偵測並移除仿冒品與盜版。

summary.en: Onebrief makes military headquarters run seamlessly.
summary.zh: Onebrief 讓軍事指揮部運作流暢無礙。

highlight.en: Replaces slow, PowerPoint-based military planning with collaborative software that turns every input into reusable building blocks and keeps artifacts in sync.
highlight.zh: 以協作軟體取代以 PowerPoint 為主的緩慢軍事規劃流程,將每筆輸入轉化為可重用的構建模組並讓各項規劃文件保持同步。

summary.en: A modern-day mental healthcare company for global workforces.
summary.zh: 為全球勞動力打造的現代化心理健康照護公司。

highlight.en: Serves 4 million lives across 100+ countries and 50+ languages with an AI-powered ecosystem spanning digital therapeutics, virtual therapy, and its own mental health clinics.
highlight.zh: 以涵蓋數位療法、線上治療與自有心理健康診所的 AI 生態系,服務 100 多國、超過 50 種語言的 400 萬名用戶。

summary.en: Online cohort-based courses for architects, engineers, and designers.
summary.zh: 為建築師、工程師與設計師開設的線上同梯制課程。

highlight.en: Serves learners in 45+ countries with project-based AEC courses taught by professionals from firms like Autodesk and BIG, reaching 84% completion rates.
highlight.zh: 為 45 個以上國家的學員提供以專案為主的 AEC 課程,由 Autodesk、BIG 等公司的專業人士授課,完成率達 84%。

summary.en: Get matched with the top 1% of talent in 24 hours.
summary.zh: 在 24 小時內媒合頂尖 1% 的人才。

highlight.en: Matches companies with vetted designers, engineers, and no-coders who deliver results through its app every 24 business hours for a flat monthly fee.
highlight.zh: 為企業媒合經篩選的設計師、工程師與無程式碼人才,他們以固定月費透過該應用每 24 個工作小時交付成果。

summary.en: Smart micro financing for everyone.
summary.zh: 為每個人提供的智慧微型融資。

highlight.en: Billed as Latin America's first AI-powered, credit-focused bank and the leading AI lending app in Mexico.
highlight.zh: 號稱拉丁美洲首家以 AI 驅動、專注於信貸的銀行,也是墨西哥領先的 AI 借貸應用程式。

summary.en: A one-stop shop for restaurants to operate and grow their business.
summary.zh: 讓餐廳營運並成長的一站式平台。

highlight.en: A restaurant management platform bundling POS, payment terminals, online ordering, delivery, and loyalty for a fixed monthly fee instead of hefty commissions.
highlight.zh: 一個餐廳管理平台,以固定月費整合 POS、付款終端、線上點餐、外送與忠誠度計畫,而非收取高額抽成。

summary.en: An accounts receivable platform for Latin American enterprises.
summary.zh: 為拉丁美洲企業打造的應收帳款平台。

highlight.en: Helps companies raise their monthly collection rate through payment method management, failed payment retries, and automated reminders and notifications.
highlight.zh: 透過付款方式管理、失敗款項重試,以及自動化提醒與通知,協助企業提高每月收款率。

summary.en: A corporate card solution for Indian businesses.
summary.zh: 為印度企業打造的企業卡解決方案。

highlight.en: Provides corporate credit cards, vendor payments, and forex remittance via bank partnerships, with a startup-friendly underwriting process for spend management.
highlight.zh: 透過與銀行合作提供企業信用卡、供應商付款與外匯匯款,並以友善新創的核保流程支援支出管理。

summary.en: Lattice for Latam with personalized learning and development.
summary.zh: 拉丁美洲版的 Lattice,結合個人化的學習與發展。

highlight.en: Helps companies in Latam develop even remote workforces by setting and tracking goals, evaluating performance, and training staff with online courses.
highlight.zh: 協助拉丁美洲企業透過設定與追蹤目標、評估績效及線上課程培訓,發展即使遠端的勞動力。

summary.en: The global financial platform for affluent consumers in the Americas.
summary.zh: 為美洲富裕消費者打造的全球金融平台。

highlight.en: Formerly DolarApp, it opens the world's strongest assets and markets to travelers, investors, and professionals so they can spend, send, and grow money anywhere.
highlight.zh: 前身為 DolarApp,為旅客、投資者與專業人士開啟全球最強的資產與市場,讓他們在任何地方消費、匯款與增值。

summary.en: A B2B e-commerce and fintech platform for traditional proximity stores.
summary.zh: 為傳統社區小店打造的 B2B 電商與金融科技平台。

highlight.en: Lets traditional retailers in French-speaking Africa order consumer goods with free 24-hour delivery and also offers them microloans.
highlight.zh: 讓法語非洲的傳統零售商訂購消費性商品並享 24 小時免費配送,同時也為他們提供小額貸款。

summary.en: Helping students in Latin America graduate from college.
summary.zh: 幫助拉丁美洲學生順利大學畢業。

highlight.en: Provides personalized college entrance exam prep with video lessons, live tutoring, and AI study plans, serving 25,000+ students annually with 90% YoY growth.
highlight.zh: 提供個人化的大學入學考試準備,結合影片課程、即時輔導與 AI 學習計畫,每年服務逾 25,000 名學生,年成長率達 90%。

summary.en: Online training for healthcare jobs.
summary.zh: 醫療職缺的線上培訓。

highlight.en: Trains people with a high school education in four months and places them into roles like medical assistants and phlebotomists in the fast-growing healthcare sector.
highlight.zh: 在四個月內培訓具高中學歷者,並將他們安置於醫療助理、抽血師等職位,投入快速成長的醫療產業。

summary.en: A learning platform for job seekers with automated job applications.
summary.zh: 為求職者打造、具自動化投遞功能的學習平台。

highlight.en: An ed-fintech platform that trains job seekers for tech careers in QA, sales, and support, finances them, and automates their job hunting.
highlight.zh: 一個結合教育與金融科技的平台,為求職者培訓 QA、銷售與支援等科技職涯,提供資金並自動化其求職流程。

summary.en: Software for bookkeepers.
summary.zh: 為記帳師打造的軟體。

highlight.en: Builds the kind of back-office software venture-backed bookkeepers like Pilot write internally, and sells it to the 1.5M bookkeepers across the US.
highlight.zh: 打造如同 Pilot 等創投支持的記帳公司內部自製的後台軟體,並銷售給全美 150 萬名記帳師。

summary.en: Making instant offers to buy homes in India.
summary.zh: 在印度即時提出購屋報價。

highlight.en: Uses a pricing model built on real estate transaction data to make instant home-purchase offers, then refurbishes and resells through channel partners.
highlight.zh: 運用建立在房地產交易資料上的定價模型即時提出購屋報價,接著翻修並透過通路夥伴轉售。

summary.en: Flexible on-demand storage space for households, SMEs, and travelers.
summary.zh: 為家庭、中小企業與旅客提供彈性隨選的儲物空間。

highlight.en: A valet self-storage service that picks up household and seasonal belongings, stores them in its facility, and returns them on demand.
highlight.zh: 一項代客自助倉儲服務,負責收取家庭與季節性物品,存放於自有設施,並依需求送回。

summary.en: Helping accountants automate work and serve their customers online.
summary.zh: 協助會計師自動化工作並於線上服務客戶。

highlight.en: A SaaS that helps accountants in Mexico automate bookkeeping and serve clients online, claiming bookkeeping speeds five times faster.
highlight.zh: 一款 SaaS,協助墨西哥會計師自動化記帳並於線上服務客戶,號稱記帳速度提升五倍。

summary.en: AI-native on-call and incident response.
summary.zh: AI 原生的待命排班與事故應變。

highlight.en: A modern on-call and incident management platform used by companies including Dropbox, Figma, LinkedIn, and NVIDIA.
highlight.zh: 一個現代化的待命排班與事故管理平台,被 Dropbox、Figma、LinkedIn 與 NVIDIA 等公司採用。

summary.en: Web search rebuilt for LLMs.
summary.zh: 為大型語言模型重新打造的網路搜尋。

highlight.en: A search engine built for AIs that lets developers filter the internet's content with complex queries to bring the world's knowledge into their AI apps.
highlight.zh: 一個為 AI 打造的搜尋引擎,讓開發者以複雜查詢過濾網路內容,將世界的知識帶入他們的 AI 應用。

summary.en: Infrastructure management software for water and electricity companies.
summary.zh: 為水務與電力公司打造的基礎設施管理軟體。

highlight.en: Helps utilities in emerging markets cut losses from leakage, theft, and uncollected bills, having reduced average client revenue losses by 45% across 560k+ endpoints.
highlight.zh: 協助新興市場的公用事業降低因漏損、竊用與欠繳所造成的損失,已在逾 56 萬個端點上將客戶平均營收損失減少 45%。

summary.en: Banking, corporate cards, and stablecoin payments, available globally.
summary.zh: 提供銀行服務、企業卡與穩定幣支付,全球皆可使用。

highlight.en: Billed as the Costco of business banking, it works with 5,000+ mid-market businesses, moves $30bn a year, and offers accounts to companies in 100+ countries.
highlight.zh: 號稱企業銀行界的 Costco,服務逾 5,000 家中型企業,每年資金流動達 300 億美元,並為 100 多國的企業提供帳戶。

summary.en: Automated pricing for eCommerce and on-demand service companies.
summary.zh: 為電商與隨選服務公司提供自動化定價。

highlight.en: Its pricing engine adjusts millions of product prices in real time across 30+ countries, claiming up to 12% revenue gains, with 15+ multi-billion-dollar clients.
highlight.zh: 其定價引擎在 30 多國即時調整數百萬項商品價格,號稱可帶來最高 12% 的營收成長,並擁有 15 家以上的數十億美元級客戶。

summary.en: Payments infrastructure for government benefits.
summary.zh: 為政府福利打造的支付基礎設施。

highlight.en: Lets businesses accept government benefits like SNAP through a single API, starting with EBT SNAP online to serve over 42 million Americans on assistance.
highlight.zh: 讓企業透過單一 API 接受 SNAP 等政府福利,從線上 EBT SNAP 著手,服務逾 4,200 萬名領取補助的美國人。

summary.en: Home electrification at $0 upfront cost.
summary.zh: 零頭期款的家庭電氣化方案。

highlight.en: Helps homeowners in Southern Europe install solar, storage, and heat pumps at zero upfront cost, paid through predictable monthly savings.
highlight.zh: 協助南歐屋主以零頭期款安裝太陽能、儲能與熱泵,透過可預期的每月節省金額分期支付。
